to_premise_partial: Git is integrated into the vault's workflow and captures many changes, though not necessarily every single operation.
notes: keeps git-captures-changes, drops every-write-auto-commit guarantee

to_premise_partial: Documents are markdown with YAML frontmatter that holds most of their metadata.
notes: keeps frontmatter-holds-metadata, drops 'single/only layer'

to_premise_partial: Write locks are file-level and SQLite-backed, and are expected to be released in a timely way.
notes: keeps timely-release expectation, drops explicit 60s TTL/auto mechanism

to_premise_partial: The server coordinates vault access through a process lock intended to keep a single writer at a time.
notes: keeps single-writer intent, drops SIGTERM-and-takeover guarantee

to_premise_partial: RBAC is configured largely through .daftari/config.yaml.
notes: keeps config-driven, 'largely' leaves room for some runtime management

to_premise_partial: Edge strength decreases as time passes since an edge was last re-derived.
notes: keeps decay-with-time, drops the interval=f(strength)->due mechanism

to_premise_partial: The monitor uses an evaluation set that is largely kept separate from the curation pass's working material.
notes: keeps separation, 'largely' hedges the never-seen guarantee

to_premise_partial: The envelope has the agent act within set policy and flag many out-of-policy situations.
notes: keeps act-within/flag, 'many' not 'all surfaced for ratification'

to_premise_partial: Krakovna et al. (2018) penalize cumulative irreversible effects, a theme closely related to the trust budget.
notes: keeps the thematic link, drops 'direct/closest antecedent' clincher

to_premise_partial: The strength gate and the budget gate each tend to address somewhat different failure modes.
notes: keeps different-modes, 'somewhat/tend' drops 'disjoint, each blind'

to_premise_partial: The loop's birth mode both proposes candidate edges and feeds them into the loop's own processing.
notes: keeps propose+process, drops 're-validates so no separate pipeline' clincher

to_premise_partial: The markdown files are the primary store and the SQLite index is largely derived from them.
notes: keeps markdown-primary, 'largely derived' leaves doubt all is rebuildable

to_premise_partial: The default embedding setup runs locally for most indexing work.
notes: keeps local-default, 'most' hedges the no-API-call absolute

to_premise_partial: Daftari's curation engine leans toward recording tensions and tends not to auto-resolve contradictions.
notes: keeps preserve-tension lean, 'leans/tends' drops the deliberate-never-resolve rationale

to_premise_partial: Trust strength is based primarily on independent re-derivation rather than on usage.
notes: keeps re-derivation-primary-over-usage, drops the firm 'usage has no effect / Goodhart' clincher

to_premise_partial: A literature review found substantial prior work close to the paper's theoretical claims.
notes: keeps prior-work-near-claim, drops 'so synthesis is the surviving contribution'

to_premise_partial: The curation engine is designed to be largely advisory, surfacing issues for people to act on.
notes: keeps advisory lean, 'largely' leaves room for some auto-fix

to_premise_partial: The vault strongly prefers deprecating or superseding documents over deleting them.
notes: keeps prefer-deprecate, 'strongly prefers' not 'never'

to_premise_partial: The re-validation pass is meant to reach an independent judgment rather than simply echo the stored answer.
notes: keeps independence intent, drops the explicit don't-re-read-the-doc mechanism

to_premise_partial: Because changes are recoverable, the trust budget is aimed more at managing reviewer load than at preventing permanent damage.
notes: keeps recoverable->reviewer-load lean, 'aimed more at' hedges

to_premise_partial: Re-derivation is generally scheduled at session boundaries rather than fired on every change.
notes: keeps session-batching, 'generally' drops the deliberate-anti-cramming rationale

to_premise_partial: Frontmatter writes are designed to preserve existing fields rather than overwrite the whole block.
notes: keeps preserve-fields intent, drops the 197-file incident + strict field-by-field requirement

to_premise_partial: The design discourages the curation pass from directly chasing its own quality score.
notes: keeps don't-chase-score lean, 'discourages' not 'must never'

to_premise_partial: The scheduler tries to give low-priority edges at least some review attention over time.
notes: keeps some-attention lean, drops 'guaranteed every cycle / reserved slice'

to_premise_partial: The loop generally avoids re-validating an edge in the same session it was written.
notes: keeps avoid-same-session lean, 'generally' not 'must not'

to_premise_partial: Evaluations suggest the airlock's main benefit shows up more in consistency than in average score.
notes: keeps consistency-over-mean lean, 'suggest...more in' hedges

to_premise_partial: In some cases the airlock appears to do more than just block actions.
notes: keeps does-more-than-block lean, 'some cases...appears' hedges the A3 specifics

to_premise_partial: Using document link popularity as a trust signal is viewed with caution in the design.
notes: keeps caution-toward-link-popularity, drops the firm 'would corrupt / Goodhart' clincher
